title: Home
subtitleMap: The live Knowledge Map, work items, and quick links.
noNodesEditor: Add nodes on the Knowledge Map page to see them here with links to channels and wiki spaces.
noNodesViewer: An editor with knowledge_map:write can add nodes to the map.
mapHint: Navigate the Knowledge Map, click node to visit channel or wiki space.
workItemsIntro: Recent document relationships (supersedes, amends, implements, see also). Open a document to resolve or update lifecycle.
workItemsEmpty: No items in the recent queue.
shareRequestsEmpty: Nothing here yet. Future versions will surface access and collaboration requests.
subtitleHomeWithoutKnowledgeMap: Knowledge operations: document lifecycle signals and shortcuts. The Knowledge Map appears here when you have access to it.
